시편 71:1.content: In you, Yahweh, I take refuge. Never let me be disappointed.

시편 71:2.content: Deliver me in your righteousness, and rescue me. Turn your ear to me, and save me.

시편 71:3.content: Be to me a rock of refuge to which I may always go. Give the command to save me, for you are my rock and my fortress.

시편 71:4.content: Rescue me, my God, from the hand of the wicked, from the hand of the unrighteous and cruel man.

시편 71:5.content: For you are my hope, Lord Yahweh, my confidence from my youth.

시편 71:6.content: I have relied on you from the womb. You are he who took me out of my mother’s womb. I will always praise you.

시편 71:7.content: I am a marvel to many, but you are my strong refuge.

시편 71:8.content: My mouth shall be filled with your praise, with your honor all day long.

시편 71:9.content: Don’t reject me in my old age. Don’t forsake me when my strength fails.

시편 71:10.content: For my enemies talk about me. Those who watch for my soul conspire together,

시편 71:11.content: saying, “God has forsaken him. Pursue and take him, for no one will rescue him.”

시편 71:12.content: God, don’t be far from me. My God, hurry to help me.

시편 71:13.content: Let my accusers be disappointed and consumed. Let them be covered with disgrace and scorn who want to harm me.

시편 71:14.content: But I will always hope, and will add to all of your praise.

시편 71:15.content: My mouth will tell about your righteousness, and of your salvation all day, though I don’t know its full measure.

시편 71:16.content: I will come with the mighty acts of the Lord Yahweh. I will make mention of your righteousness, even of yours alone.

시편 71:17.content: God, you have taught me from my youth. Until now, I have declared your wondrous works.

시편 71:18.content: Yes, even when I am old and gray-haired, God, don’t forsake me, until I have declared your strength to the next generation, your might to everyone who is to come.

시편 71:19.content: Your righteousness also, God, reaches to the heavens; you have done great things. God, who is like you?

시편 71:20.content: You, who have shown us many and bitter troubles, you will let me live. You will bring us up again from the depths of the earth.

시편 71:21.content: Increase my honor and comfort me again.

시편 71:22.content: I will also praise you with the harp for your faithfulness, my God. I sing praises to you with the lyre, Holy One of Israel.

시편 71:23.content: My lips shall shout for joy! My soul, which you have redeemed, sings praises to you!

시편 71:24.content: My tongue will also talk about your righteousness all day long, for they are disappointed, and they are confounded, who want to harm me.
